actions.expression:
SELECT cymx.fphm,
       cymx.RMBkh,
       cymx.jxmc1,
       cymx.jxje1,
       cymx.jxmc2,
       cymx.jxje2,
       cymx.jxmc3,
       cymx.jxje3,
       cymx.jjxmc1,
       cymx.jjxje1,
       cymx.jjxmc2,
       cymx.jjxje2,
       cymx.jjxmc3,
       cymx.jjxje3,
       cymx.huilv,
       cymx.zysx,
       cymx.qtshm,
       cymx.hzjx,
       cymx.hzjix,
       cymx.ygnlf,
       cymx.zgfy,
       cymx.ckfy,
       cymx.wxje,
       cymx.mjzj,
       cymx.yzaf,
       cymx.qtusd,
       cymx.qtrmb,
       cymx.wxjez,
       cymx.jxUSD,
       cymx.jxKHRMB,
       cymx.jxRMB,
       cymx.chyrq,
       cymx.sjcy1,
       cymx.xbfl,
       cymx.htje,
       cymx.cghjzje,
       cymx.cbzje,
       cymx.tszje,
       cymx.lirbl,
       cymx.ayjje,
       cymx.myjje
FROM cymx 
WHERE (cymx.fphm=[出运改单.发票号码]) LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.wxht,
       cymxsheet.cpbh,
       cymxsheet.zwpm,
       cymxsheet.zhwbgpm,
       cymxsheet.zzsl,
       cymxsheet.cght,
       cymxsheet.gcmc,
       cymxsheet.chsl,
       cymxsheet.gcjg,
       cymxsheet.gczj,
       cymxsheet.wxjg,
       cymxsheet.wxzj,
       cymxsheet.tsl,
       cymxsheet.tse,
       cymxsheet.wxrl,
       cymxsheet.chxs,
       cymxsheet.wxmz,
       cymxsheet.zmz,
       cymxsheet.wxjz,
       cymxsheet.zjz,
       cymxsheet.wxtj,
       cymxsheet.ztj,
       cymxsheet.ywrya,
       cymxsheet.ywry,
       cymxsheet.gdry,
       cymxsheet.fphm,
       cymxsheet.cywyzd,
       cymxsheet.scrq,
       cymxsheet.jsfs,
       cymxsheet.yjdj,
       cymxsheet.yjzj,
       cymxsheet.mjdj1,
       cymxsheet.mjzj,
       cymxsheet.wxzjz,
       cymxsheet.mll,
       cymxsheet.yjbl,
       cymxsheet.yj,
       cymxsheet.RMBkh,
       cymxsheet.aybl,
       cymxsheet.asl6,
       cymxsheet.ayj,
       cymxsheet.pgwy,
       cymxsheet.gczjrmb,
       cymxsheet.zycpbh,
       cymxsheet.khhh,
       cymxsheet.sfpx,
       cymxsheet.cghbdm,
       cymxsheet.URzj,
       cymxsheet.ljrk,
       cymxsheet.kpfy
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE ((cymxsheet.ywrya=[出运改单.产品资料.采购人员]) 
  OR (cymxsheet.ywry=[出运改单.产品资料.业务人员]) 
  OR (cymxsheet.gdry=[出运改单.产品资料.跟单人员]) 
  OR (cymxsheet.ywpath LIKE :c_depart) 
  OR (cymx.ywry=[出运改单.产品资料.业务人员]1)) 
  AND (cymxsheet.fphm=[出运改单.发票号码]) 
  AND (cymx.sid=cymxsheet.pid)

actions.name: 计算-采购总价
actions.caption: 计算-采购总价
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.出货数量]*[出运改单.产品资料.采购单价]
actions.output: 出运改单.产品资料.采购总价

actions.name: 计算-外销总价
actions.caption: 计算-外销总价
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.外销单价]*[出运改单.产品资料.出货数量]
actions.output: 出运改单.产品资料.外销总价

actions.name: 计算-产品资料-客户RMB总价
actions.caption: 计算-产品资料-客户RMB总价
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.出货数量]*[出运改单.产品资料.客户RMB单价]
actions.output: 出运改单.产品资料.客户RMB总价

actions.name: 计算-总 毛 重
actions.caption: 计算-总 毛 重
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.毛    重]*[出运改单.产品资料.箱    数]
actions.output: 出运改单.产品资料.总 毛 重

actions.name: 计算-总 净 重
actions.caption: 计算-总 净 重
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.净    重]*[出运改单.产品资料.箱    数]
actions.output: 出运改单.产品资料.总 净 重

actions.name: 计算-总 体 积
actions.caption: 计算-总 体 积
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.外箱体积]*[出运改单.产品资料.箱    数]
actions.output: 出运改单.产品资料.总 体 积

actions.name: 计算-佣金总价
actions.caption: 计算-佣金总价
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.出货数量]*[出运改单.产品资料.佣金单价]
actions.output: 出运改单.产品资料.佣金总价

actions.name: 计算-货值加项合计
actions.caption: 计算-货值加项合计
actions.expression: [出运改单.加项金额1]+[出运改单.加项金额2]+[出运改单.加项金额3]
actions.output: 出运改单.货值加项合计

actions.name: 计算-货值减项合计
actions.caption: 计算-货值减项合计
actions.expression: [出运改单.减项金额1]+[出运改单.减项金额2]+[出运改单.减项金额3]
actions.output: 出运改单.货值减项合计

actions.name: 计算-额外货值
actions.caption: 计算-额外货值
actions.expression: [出运改单.货值加项合计.]-[出运改单.货值减项合计.]

actions.name: 计算-客户RMB总价
actions.caption: 计算-客户RMB总价
actions.expression: [出运改单.产品资料.出货数量]*[出运改单.产品资料.客户RMB单价]

view.params:
SELECT top 3000 cymxsheet.fphm
FROM cymxsheet
WHERE  (cymxsheet.ywpath LIKE :c_depart)
   or  (cymxsheet.ywrya=:c_user)
   or  (cymxsheet.ywry=:c_user)
   or  (cymxsheet.gdry=:c_user) group by cymxsheet.fphm
